# Sabnode Exhaustive Pages Masterplan

This document outlines all pages in the Sabnode ecosystem. Due to the massive scale (1700+ pages), this document is automatically structured to track current features, potential features, known errors, and enhancement plans for every individual page.

## 📁 Module: [shortcode]

### 📄 `/[shortCode]`
- **Current Features**: Standard UI for Shortcode. Needs manual audit to list all active micro-features.
- **Possible Features**: AI-assisted Shortcode generation, real-time collaboration, bulk editing, CSV export/import.
- **Errors**: No critical errors logged. Potential hydration or mobile responsiveness edge cases to verify.
- **Enhancement Plan**: Migrate to latest React 19 concurrent features, implement skeleton loaders for async data, add strict Zod validation, and ensure 100% WCAG accessibility compliance.
